title: pelargonium scabrum var. balsameum
intro: Pelargonium scabrum var. balsameum, also known as the Mountain Geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium scabrum var. balsameum include its ability to soothe sore throats, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable remedy in natural medicine.
